sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75677" key="o)sfuh/c" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀσφῠήξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἄγνυμι</etym>) <sense id="n75677.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having dislocated one's hip</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γέρων</foreign> Poet. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Lex. de Spir.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.209</biblScope> </bibl> V.</sense> </entryFree>
